item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 5min FWIW I would say on one hand that it is a new venture and you can't build these thin
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 5min FWIW I would say on one hand that it is a new venture and you can't build these things overnight.
However, as much as it is a nice event to introduce, you need more players showing up than do now. Otherwise people will just talk about the absentees.
#Snooker #ChampionsDinner Cita Steve McVeigh @Boxingscience20 · 9min En respuesta a @Nick_Metcalfe y @RadioSnooker He's right. Look at golf, Nick. These guys all turn up. They're all delighted to be there. Love the camaraderie. Wtf is wrong with all these snooker professionals. 1 2 101

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 21min Shaun Murphy tells @RadioSnooker that he doesn't think the Champions Dinner can c
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 21min Shaun Murphy tells @RadioSnooker that he doesn't think the Champions Dinner can continue if more players don't show up.
Murphy: 'I think it's a real shame that a lot of the champions who had that special invite chose not to come.'
https:// podcasts.apple.com/gb/podcast/liv e-from-2026-world-championship-shaun-murphy-champions/id1778586026?i=1000762026581 …
#RadioSnooker podcasts.apple.com LIVE FROM 2026 WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP - Shaun Murphy: Champions Dinner won't continue if more players... Podcast Episode · Radio Snooker with Nick Metcalfe · 17 April · 7min 2 1 5 329

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 27min UP NEXT!
First round action of the European Darts Grand Prix continues this evening wit
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 27min UP NEXT!
First round action of the European Darts Grand Prix continues this evening with the following eight matches coming your way!
1900 CEST | 1800 BST
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 2 24 5 mil

Dave Clark @DaveClarkTV · 27min I used to be a crypto trading skeptic, but everything changed when I met @NikolinaSabljc an expert trader who showed me the ropes. I'm excited to share that I've just received my 4th payout of £50,000 which was credited directly to my bank account in just two hours! 1 1 mil
